symptoms.symptom_name: Profound cold intolerance despite an over-heated room

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Impaired thermogenesis is a cardinal feature of thyroid hormone deficiency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Ten days of obstipation with abdominal distension and nausea

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Gastrointestinal hypomotility from hypothyroidism causes severe constipation.
Ten days without a motion plus distension and nausea must be excluded urgently.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight gain (~8 kg) despite poor appetite

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Metabolic slowing and fluid retention cause weight gain despite reduced intake.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound fatigue rendering the patient housebound

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe fatigue and lethargy are hallmark hypothyroid symptoms but are non-specific alone.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hoarse deep voice with slowed speech and apathy (altered mentation)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: severe decompensating hypothyroidism with early myxoedema
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hoarse voice from mucopolysaccharide deposition plus slowed cognition marks advanced decompensation.
Altered mental state is a defining component of the myxoedema-coma prodrome.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: severe decompensating hypothyroidism with early myxoedema
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bradycardia reflects the depth of thyroid deficiency and is part of the myxoedema triad. The AI infers a slow pulse from carer report, not a measured HR.
Hypothermia with bradycardia and altered mentation defines the myxoedema-crisis edge; measured core temperature is clinician-obtained.

symptoms.symptom_name: Delayed relaxation phase of the ankle (Achilles) reflex

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Delayed deep-tendon reflex relaxation is a classic, near-specific sign of hypothyroidism — but it cannot be elicited via telehealth.
A goitre supports an autoimmune thyroid cause; confirmed only on palpation/imaging, not remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dry coarse skin and brittle thinning hair

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Dry coarse skin and brittle hair are typical hypothyroid integumentary changes; partly video-observable, partly examination.
Periorbital/facial myxoedema is a recognisable sign, and is video-observable in telehealth (offered in objective_data).

symptoms.symptom_name: Elevated TSH with low free T4

investigation_details.investigation_name: Thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, free T3)
investigation_details.expected_result: High TSH with low free T4, confirming primary hypothyroidism (anticipated, pending urgent bloods)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The diagnosis cannot be confirmed and thyroxine cannot be safely dosed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated TSH with low free T4 is the biochemical definition of primary hypothyroidism — never available in real time via telehealth.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The autoimmune aetiology is not confirmed, though it does not change acute management.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Positive anti-TPO identifies the autoimmune cause of the primary hypothyroidism.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Cold intolerance/weight gain, severe fatigue/constipation, delayed reflex relaxation and elevated TSH/low free T4 together form the classic hypothyroid tetrad.
Altered mental state, bradycardia and hypothermia on a severe hypothyroid background herald myxoedema coma and drive the urgent disposition.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent TSH and free T4 (with free T3)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms primary hypothyroidism and its severity; required before thyroxine can be safely commenced.
Identifies the autoimmune (Hashimoto's) cause; does not change acute management.
Assess for hyponatraemia, hypoglycaemia and the bradycardia that accompany decompensating hypothyroidism / myxoedema.
Ten days of obstipation with distension needs in-person assessment to exclude/manage impaction or obstruction.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Empirical community thyroxine trial without bloods
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Thyroxine must not be started remotely before confirmatory TFTs and clinician review, particularly in a decompensating patient.
